arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea target has release clause lowered as Enzo Maresca eyes elite winger
arts.sum: Chelsea are expected to be in the market for a new winger this summer amid their attacking frailties – and one of their targets has seen his price tag lowered. The Blues have been long-time admirers of Rafael Leao, with the Portuguese star repeatedly linked to the club – even before Chelsea’s new owners took […] The post Report: Chelsea target has release clause lowered as Enzo Maresca eyes elite winger appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Jackson injury latest amid Chelsea return date, Maresca admission and Spurs hint
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca said after the game that the club were hopeful it was nothing serious for the 23-year-old striker but after having a scan the week later, the results turned out to be worse than initially feared. "His reaction was quite good so we all thought that was not a big injury but unfortunately, he had the scan a few days ago and it was an important one.

arts.ttl: Scathing Jadon Sancho verdict given as Chelsea icon goes on furious and brutal X-rated rant
arts.sum: A furious John Obi Mikel has delivered a scathing assessment of Jadon Sancho's current form and the former Chelsea midfielder has said it would be a "disaster" if the club do not qualify for next season's UEFA Champions League. There is an obligation to buy Sancho in the summer transfer window for £25million, football.london understands, but recent performances from the 24-year-old winger has seen fans question whether that was the right move from their club.

arts.ttl: Three players who can save Chelsea millions on transfers and solve Enzo Maresca problem right now
arts.sum: McNeilly, who actually started the 2023/24 campaign as a 17-year-old, was promoted regularly to the Under-21 side by the end and scored four times there as well. Maresca has explained that he sees the available wingers (Pedro Neto and 19-year-old academy graduate Tyrique George) as being able to play the role.

arts.ttl: I saw a different Maresca at Chelsea press conference as message sent to Boehly
arts.sum: "I've always been clear since day one: I'm not here to - and I've said this already a few times - I'm not here to survive, I'm here to win games, I'm here to bring this club to fight for titles," Maresca said, defiantly . In recent weeks, Maresca perhaps went into his shell a bit more - understandably given the Blues' run of form in the Premier League, with two wins from their last nine matches in the competition.

arts.ttl: 15 cut-price players Chelsea can target this summer to fix Enzo Maresca's biggest problems
arts.sum: And whilst Todd Boehly and Co. have so often waved huge sums in the faces of selling clubs for their best talent in recent years, the largest amount of money is not exactly the answer to every single problem. Whilst football.london reported last November the club have no interest in Liverpool's Caoimhin Kelleher, the Irish goalkeeper is another who is out of contract next year and could be sold for a lower price as a result.
